context: Tests whether the agent correctly resolves Nashville and Austin to the user's preferred ICAO codes (KMQY and KEDC), converts local Central Daylight Time to UTC, uses the correct CLI argument format, and always includes the --cache flag.

checklist.name: Nashville as KMQY
checklist.description: Uses KMQY as the origin airport code (not KBNA, BNA, or any other Nashville code)

checklist.name: Austin as KEDC
checklist.description: Uses KEDC as the destination airport code (not KAUS, AUS, or any other Austin code)

checklist.name: Cache flag included
checklist.description: Includes the --cache flag in the flightweather.py command

checklist.name: Correct UTC time
checklist.description: Departure time converted to 14:00 UTC (9 AM CDT = UTC-5, so 09:00 + 05:00 = 14:00)

checklist.name: Correct date format
checklist.description: Date argument is formatted as YYYY-MM-DD (i.e., 2026-03-28)

checklist.name: Correct altitude format
checklist.description: Altitude passed as an integer (9500), not a string or float

checklist.name: TAS flag used
checklist.description: Includes --tas 145 to specify the aircraft's true airspeed

checklist.name: Correct argument order
checklist.description: Command follows the positional order: ORIGIN DESTINATION DATE TIME_UTC ALTITUDE_FT [options]
